workshoptitle: Codex Prompt Engineering for Oracle Workshop Development

tutorials.title: Introduction
tutorials.description: Workshop overview, audience, and learning objectives.

tutorials.title: Get Started
tutorials.description: Review the source material, tooling, and working assumptions for this workshop.

tutorials.title: Lab 1: Configure Codex, MCP, and Local Access
tutorials.description: Set up the Codex working model, baseline configuration, and MCP tool plan.

tutorials.title: Lab 2: Create a Presentation from Blogs, Docs, and the Oracle Style Guide
tutorials.description: Turn grounded source material into an Oracle-style presentation draft.

tutorials.title: Lab 3: Build a Lab from the Presentation
tutorials.description: Convert presentation content into a LiveLabs-style lab draft.

tutorials.title: Lab 4: Deploy OCI Resources Through the Console and CLI
tutorials.description: Define and structure the OCI environment needed to support the workshop.

tutorials.title: Lab 5: Plan the APEX Buildout
tutorials.description: Shape the APEX application plan and turn it into workshop-ready implementation units.

tutorials.title: Lab 6: Add a New Lab to an Existing Workshop
tutorials.description: Extend an existing workshop while preserving structure, style, and sequencing.

tutorials.title: Need Help?
tutorials.description: Solutions to common problems and directions for receiving live help.
